cards.back: A distributed computing framework used for storing and processing large data sets
To provide a scalable and fault-tolerant solution for big data processing

cards.front: What is the main difference between Hadoop and RDBMS
cards.back: Hadoop is designed for handling large-scale data, while RDBMS is designed for handling structured data
